outcome_autofill_reasoning: The call was a substantive conversation with the intended contact (Danielle Paulson). Key details were discussed: buffet for 50 people, passed hors d'oeuvres, charcuterie board, veggie platter, pricing ballpark confirmed. Danielle had already (apparently) signed up for a tasting on May 17th at 2:00 PM and paid via Google Pay. The agent confirmed the tasting date and asked Danielle to send the receipt to finalize the reservation. A clear next step (the tasting on May 17th) was established, which functions as a booked meeting/appointment. The prospect is engaged, qualified (has a real event, defined guest count, menu preferences, and budget awareness), and a specific date/time for the tasting was confirmed.

recording_transcript.summary_html:
• Confirmed backyard event for mid-July with 70 invited guests, planning to serve 50 people buffet-style at rented mansion venue.
  • Finalized menu structure: passed hors d'oeuvres, charcuterie board or vegetable platter standing station, plus buffet dinner with no professional bartender.
  • Scheduled May 17th tasting at 2:00 PM with up to five attendees; Danielle to send registration receipt for table confirmation.
  • Andre to send pricing calculator tool for menu exploration before tasting; final selections and pricing will be confirmed at event.
  • Ballpark pricing provided but will increase slightly with addition of hors d'oeuvres service to final quote.

Event Overview and Venue

  • Danielle is planning a mid-July backyard event for a friend through recommendation from Tim at Vinwood Catering.
  • The host wants to use Swim Elite app to rent a million-dollar mansion backyard with built-in coverage, outdoor kitchen, kitchenette, and pool area.
  • Covered venue eliminates need for tents and provides weather protection.
  • Expected guest list is 70 people, with approximately 50 expected to actually eat, including children.

Budget and Bartending Decisions

  • Danielle advised the host to skip hiring a bartender and allocate budget toward food and venue instead.
  • She noted that guests typically bring their own beverages to backyard events and drink less traditional mixed drinks.
  • Client still wants a bar setup available but without professional bartender service.
  • Andre confirmed Comeketo Catering can assist with setting up a bar area.

Menu and Food Planning

  • Client wants buffet for 50 people with pass hors d'oeuvres, charcuterie board, and vegetable platter as standing appetizers.
  • Plan includes three to four passed appetizers and one standing station appetizer, followed by buffet dinner.
  • Danielle invited her foodies "guncles" (gay uncles) to ensure high-quality food impression.
  • Menu details will be finalized at tasting event rather than over phone.
  • Pricing quote does not yet include hors d'oeuvres but will be added to final cost.
  • Service staff for passing hors d'oeuvres is included in the appetizer pricing.

Tasting Event Details

  • Danielle previously signed up for May 17th tasting at 2:00 PM but needs to confirm registration by sending receipt.
  • Tasting is $35 per person with up to five guests attending; $70 will be credited back toward final bill once quote is accepted.
  • Email confirmation was sent using work email (Danielle.Cosky@email.com), which may not show in system immediately.
  • Danielle will access tasting confirmation from laptop and send receipt to Andre.
  • Andre will reserve table for May 17th once receipt is received or if he locates reservation in system.

Next Steps and Tools

  • Danielle will access Comeketo's calculator tool in the email to preview full menu options and pricing.
  • Client will build preliminary menu using calculator before tasting event.
  • Final menu selections and pricing adjustments will be determined at tasting.
  • Andre requested Danielle send tasting registration confirmation immediately or as soon as accessible.
  • Andre provided his direct contact number for ongoing support and questions.
recording_transcript.summary_text:
- Confirmed backyard event for mid-July with 70 invited guests, planning to serve 50 people buffet-style at rented mansion venue.
- Finalized menu structure: passed hors d'oeuvres, charcuterie board or vegetable platter standing station, plus buffet dinner with no professional bartender.
- Scheduled May 17th tasting at 2:00 PM with up to five attendees; Danielle to send registration receipt for table confirmation.
- Andre to send pricing calculator tool for menu exploration before tasting; final selections and pricing will be confirmed at event.
- Ballpark pricing provided but will increase slightly with addition of hors d'oeuvres service to final quote.

### Event Overview and Venue
- Danielle is planning a mid-July backyard event for a friend through recommendation from Tim at Vinwood Catering.
- The host wants to use Swim Elite app to rent a million-dollar mansion backyard with built-in coverage, outdoor kitchen, kitchenette, and pool area.
- Covered venue eliminates need for tents and provides weather protection.
- Expected guest list is 70 people, with **approximately 50 expected to actually eat**, including children.

### Budget and Bartending Decisions
- Danielle advised the host to skip hiring a bartender and allocate budget toward food and venue instead.
- She noted that guests typically bring their own beverages to backyard events and drink less traditional mixed drinks.
- Client still wants a bar setup available but without professional bartender service.
- Andre confirmed Comeketo Catering can assist with setting up a bar area.

### Menu and Food Planning
- Client wants **buffet for 50 people with pass hors d'oeuvres, charcuterie board, and vegetable platter as standing appetizers**.
- Plan includes three to four passed appetizers and one standing station appetizer, followed by buffet dinner.
- Danielle invited her foodies "guncles" (gay uncles) to ensure high-quality food impression.
- Menu details will be finalized at tasting event rather than over phone.
- Pricing quote does not yet include hors d'oeuvres but will be added to final cost.
- Service staff for passing hors d'oeuvres is included in the appetizer pricing.

### Tasting Event Details
- Danielle previously signed up for May 17th tasting at 2:00 PM but needs to confirm registration by sending receipt.
- Tasting is $35 per person with up to five guests attending; $70 will be credited back toward final bill once quote is accepted.
- Email confirmation was sent using work email (Danielle.Cosky@email.com), which may not show in system immediately.
- Danielle will access tasting confirmation from laptop and send receipt to Andre.
- Andre will reserve table for May 17th once receipt is received or if he locates reservation in system.

### Next Steps and Tools
- Danielle will access Comeketo's calculator tool in the email to preview full menu options and pricing.
- Client will build preliminary menu using calculator before tasting event.
- Final menu selections and pricing adjustments will be determined at tasting.
- Andre requested Danielle send tasting registration confirmation immediately or as soon as accessible.
- Andre provided his direct contact number for ongoing support and questions.
